import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Gamma.Basic
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Gamma.Deriv
import Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Digamma
import Mathlib.MeasureTheory.Integral.IntervalIntegral
import Mathlib.Analysis.NormedSpace.Basic

open Real Set MeasureTheory

theorem deriv_Gamma_one_eq_integral : deriv Gamma 1 = ∫ x in Ioi 0, exp (-x) * log x := by
  have h := deriv_Gamma_integral (a := 1) (ha := by norm_num)
  simp [Gamma_eq_integral, one_div] at h
  exact h

theorem euler_mascheroni_closed_form :
  eulerMascheroni = -∫ x in Ioi 0, exp (-x) * log x := by
  rw [Real.digamma_one.symm]
  rw [neg_inj]
  rw [Real.digamma_eq_deriv_log_Gamma, Real.Gamma_one, div_one]
  rw [deriv_Gamma_one_eq_integral]
